name: Lighted Travel Mirror with Cover - Room Essentials™: Portable, Rectangular, 1X Magnification, LED Illumination
description:
Make getting ready or touchups while on the go easy with this Lighted Travel Mirror with Cover from Room Essentials™. Designed in a rectangular shape with rounded corners, this travel mirror features a plastic shell that lights up with a touch button on the front. Featuring an adjustable design that allows you to change the viewing angle, it comes with an attached cover that can be snap closed, making it easy to carry.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
